name: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation - Builtin
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation - Builtin
SIGMA Description: Detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent

False positives:
- Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%install-transportagent%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MSExchange Transport Agent Installation - Builtin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%install-transportagent%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation - Builtin

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
